text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub workflow failure notification for Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report.
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub notification that personal access token 'jeeves3' will expire in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub notification that personal access token 'jeevesagain' will expire in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Loop Monitor workflow failed in the jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] Mrs. Lang: Daily correspondence summary indicating 3 alerts from loop-monitor requiring attention.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow had unsuccessful jobs.
- [escalation] Mrs. Lang: Jeeves pipeline alert indicating permanent failure with 429 rate limit error on Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [reply needed] Zamzar: Zamzar billing service requesting updated payment details due to failed charge.
- [reply needed] "David Purdy (via Google Drive)": David Purdy shared a Google Drive folder named CommonGround and invited collaboration.
- [reply needed] Tavily: Stripe failed payment notification for $47.12 charge to Tavily.
